evals.expected_output: A structured review log with three clearly labelled layers. Layer 1 most findings. Each finding has severity, file:line, problem, and fix. Summary counts at end. No src/ files edited.
assertions: Output contains 'Layer 1' (or equivalent Visual/Frontend section heading)
Output contains 'Layer 2' (or equivalent Code Quality section heading)
Output contains 'Layer 3' (or equivalent Security/GDPR section heading)
Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
Output contains a file reference in the format 'file:line' or 'src/pages/index.astro'
Output contains a Summary section with finding counts
Layer 1 has more findings than Layer 2 (visual is strictest)
Output flags the generic 'Astro' title as a finding
No evidence of editing src/ files (no Write/Edit tool calls)

evals.prompt: check the code before I open a PR for this initial scaffold
evals.expected_output: Same structured 3-layer output. Layer 1 flags generic title, missing semantic landmarks, no design tokens. Layer 3 notes API routes don't exist yet. No src/ edits.
assertions: Output contains three distinct review layers or sections
Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
Output mentions missing semantic landmark elements (main, nav, header, or footer)
Output flags the title 'Astro' as needing to be changed
Output notes that no API routes exist yet (Layer 3 is limited in scope for now)
Output contains a Summary section
No evidence of editing src/ files

evals.prompt: run the portfolio review on index.astro and tell me what needs fixing
evals.expected_output: Review focused on index.astro. All 3 layers applied. Layer 1 most findings. Findings are specific (file:line), actionable, and severity-graded. No file edits.
assertions: Output references index.astro specifically
Output contains three distinct review layers or sections
Output contains at least one severity label: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NICE-TO-HAVE
Layer 1 has at least 3 distinct findings
At least one finding includes a concrete suggested fix (not just 'this is bad')
Output flags missing <main> or landmark elements
No evidence of editing src/ files
